insights.message: Moderate capital efficiency — ROE 12.3% in FY2025
High leverage risk — Debt/Equity ratio 3.91x (>2x) in FY2025
Poor cash conversion — negative CFO despite reported profit in FY2025
Negative Free Cash Flow margin -52.8% in FY2025 — heavy capex phase
